positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a friendly, anthropomorphic fox nestled within a sprawling constellation pattern. The fox has clean, confident lines and is rendered in deep indigo and burnt orange tones. The background is a cosmic void filled with geometric starbursts, nebulas of soft lavender and cyan, and interconnected glowing lines representing constellations. The overall aesthetic is elegant, modern, and slightly ethereal, designed with a strong central focus suitable for a T-shirt print. Vector art quality, clean silhouettes, high contrast, deep saturation, perfect symmetry, graphic novel illustration, golden ratio composition, perfect detail, printed on a smooth white background for isolation.
negative: blur, artifacts, grain, messy, text, watermark, logo, trademark, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, noise, signature, grayscale, washed out
